prestazioni: Engine: B5254T5 (2.5L I5 turbo, 300hp stock) - Full forged internals with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 35psi boost capability. Upgraded to a Garrett GTX4202R turbo with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valve, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by Agency Power with 200-cell catalytic converters for Euro 6 compliance.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors with a Radium Engineering dual-pump fuel surge tank (2x Walbro 450LPH pumps) and a Syvecs S8 ECU with flex-fuel sensor for E85 compatibility. Upgraded to a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump and AEM 340LPH in-tank pump for sustained 700whp capability.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Haldex 4th-gen controller (HPA Motorsports) with 100% torque split to rear wheels under hard acceleration. Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and poly bushings (Powerflex Black Series) for subframe and control arms. Quaife ATB helical LSD in the rear with upgraded CV axles (GKN Driveline) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm) with billet flywheel.
estetica: Body: Heico Sportiv Stage 3 widebody kit (V70R-specific, 30mm wider fenders) with carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Voltex (JDM-spec, bolt-on). Custom matte Volvo Polestar Blue (paint code 452) with 3M 1080 Satin Black wrap on roof, mirrors, and grille. OEM-style LED headlights (Lux H8 V4) with custom C-light DRLs and sequential turn signals.

Wheels & Brakes: BBS LM-R 19x9.5 ET35 (front) and 19x10.5 ET40 (rear) with 255/35/19 and 285/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front (380mm discs) and 4-piston rear (355mm discs) big brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided lines.

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (Volvo-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, FIA-spec) with bolt-in door bars and harness bar. Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) with quick-release hub, paired with a Pectel SQ6 digital dash and AEM CD-7 data logger. Full sound deadening (Dynamat Xtreme) and Alcantara headliner with red stitching.
